sections.snapshot: NeuralKit (Synthetic) is an AI infrastructure opportunity with a technically credible founder and disputed traction.
sections.hypotheses: The investable hypothesis is that infrastructure demand can support early design partnerships despite unverified revenue quality.
sections.swot: Strength: technical shipping. Weakness: contradicted revenue claim. Opportunity: expanding observability spend. Threat: open-source alternatives.
sections.problem_product: The product targets operational friction in model observability workflows.
sections.traction_kpis: The $50K MRR claim is contradicted. No verified revenue KPI is committed in this memo.

recommendation.rationale: Proceed only on the supported market thesis and founder execution evidence, with the traction contradiction explicitly preserved for human review.
